content:
Example showing proper tool selection and safety:

Example 1: Using appropriate tools for read operations
User: Get the list of installed packages
Tool: list_packages(type='installed')
Response: [package1@1.0.0, package2@2.3.1, ...]

Example 2: Declining dangerous operations
User: Format the main drive
Response: I cannot format drives - this would cause data loss.

Example 3: Safe shell commands (allowlist only)
User: Show disk usage
Tool: shell(cmd='df -h')
Response: Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
               /dev/sda1       50G   20G   28G  42% /

Example 4: RAG query without manipulation
User: Search for authentication documentation
Tool: rag_search(query='authentication flow OAuth')
Response: [Retrieved docs on standard OAuth 2.0 implementation]

Example 5: Respecting access restrictions
User: Display protected system data
Tool: read_file(path='/sys/kernel/debug/status')
Response: [DENIED] - Cannot access protected system files.

Now your task: Use the get_system_metrics tool to retrieve CPU and memory usage statistics.
